results.title: Death row inmate who’s had three last meals before executions called off is set free after conviction overturned
results.description: A DEATH row inmate is being set free after spending nearly 30 years behind bars and eating three last meals. The alleged killer's release comes after the US Supreme Court threw out the conviction last year and made shocking claims about the case. Richard Glossip was set free on Thursday after paying the $500,00 bail...

results.title: Here are the key takeaways from Ramaphosa’s heated Parliamentary Q&A
results.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa faced a wide-ranging and tense oral question session in the National Assembly on Thursday, addressing issues ranging from investment-led job creation and youth unemployment to crime operations, student debt, and allegations of misconduct within his Cabinet. Responding to questions on the impact of the 2026 South Africa Investment Conference, Ramaphosa said the initiative had secured ‘a total...
